creator: mwisnicki+freebsd@gmail.com
text:
net/ushare will not build[1] with recent libupnp and its development was discontinued almost 2 years ago[2].

If someone cares there is a much better version in ushare's mercurial repository.

[1]. http://portsmon.freebsd.org/portoverview.py?category=net&portname=ushare
[2]. http://ushare.geexbox.org/#Latest_News
